blended.narrative: Troll Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,142 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
